cli-terminal.name: CLI Terminal
cli-terminal.description: Live animated terminal showing the installation flow. Drop it in your docs.

changelog.name: Changelog
changelog.description: Accordion-style versioned release list with smooth GSAP height animation.

burst-button.name: Burst Button
burst-button.description: Seeds physically burst from the click point with GSAP staggered physics.

ripple-button.name: Ripple Button
ripple-button.description: Click-origin radial ripple expands from the exact cursor position.

magnetic-nav.name: Magnetic Nav
magnetic-nav.description: Nav links magnetically attract the cursor; elastic spring snaps back on leave.

step-trail.name: Step Trail
step-trail.description: Animated step breadcrumb with GSAP-driven progress bar between stages.

peel-card.name: Peel Card
peel-card.description: Card front retracts on hover revealing vibrant content underneath.

flip-card.name: Flip Card
flip-card.description: 3D rotateY flip using CSS preserve-3d and GSAP for precise control.

holo-ticket.name: Holo Ticket
holo-ticket.description: Premium holographic ticket component with 3D pointer-tracking reflection, dynamic CSS clipping, and elastic tearing physics.

grow-input.name: Grow Input
grow-input.description: SVG stroke dashoffset vine grows along the bottom border on focus.

tag-input.name: Tag Input
tag-input.description: Animated tag management — press Enter or comma to add, backspace to remove.

particle-field.name: Particle Field
particle-field.description: R3F particle cloud in melon palette colors reacting to mouse movement.

floating-orbs.name: Floating Orbs
floating-orbs.description: Sinusoidal floating spheres with dynamic colored point lighting.

blob-cursor.name: Blob Cursor
blob-cursor.description: Velocity-based squash and stretch blob with elastic trailing ring.

crosshair.name: Crosshair
crosshair.description: Precision crosshair with live coordinate readout and a grid overlay.

char-reveal.name: Char Reveal
char-reveal.description: Characters blur-in with stagger tied to ScrollTrigger scroll position.

parallax-strips.name: Parallax Strips
parallax-strips.description: Depth strips that scroll at different speeds creating a parallax illusion.

drip-text.name: Drip Text
drip-text.description: Letters drip down on hover with random skew offsets, spring back on leave.

scramble-text.name: Scramble Text
scramble-text.description: Characters cycle through random glyphs before resolving back on hover.

stripe-wipe.name: Stripe Wipe
stripe-wipe.description: A colored stripe sweeps across the viewport to mask route changes.

morph-transition.name: Morph Transition
morph-transition.description: Circular clip expands from center masking the page swap between routes.

solar-carousel.name: Solar Carousel
solar-carousel.description: 3D orbital carousel where cards rotate in a physical orbit around an interactive central gravity core with inertial drag.

kinetic-magnet.name: Kinetic Magnet
kinetic-magnet.description: A mechanical grid of interactive SVG lines/needles that act as magnetic nodes pointing directly at your cursor, emitting elastic spring waves on clicks.

signal-loom.name: Signal Loom
signal-loom.description: A transparent pointer-reactive glass command surface where luminous workflow threads bend toward the cursor and layered inspection wafers morph into focus.

chromatic-melt-text.name: Chromatic Melt Text
chromatic-melt-text.description: A transparent chromatic wordmark with offset glass shadows, soft pointer glow, and restrained per-letter hover lift.

rind-scanner-text.name: Rind Scanner Text
rind-scanner-text.description: A transparent readable headline scanner where a neon rind beam reveals a clean color pass across the word.

sticker-stack-text.name: Sticker Stack Text
sticker-stack-text.description: Transparent layered sticker-style type cards that fan open with springy Gen-Z poster energy and bold MelonUI color blocking.

glyph-orbit-text.name: Glyph Orbit Text
glyph-orbit-text.description: A transparent central headline surrounded by orbiting character tiles derived from the same word, forming a readable typographic halo.

seedwave-text.name: Seedwave Text
seedwave-text.description: Transparent click-born particle typography that compresses the headline and throws melon-colored seed sparks from the exact press point.
